variants.title: Fleetguard AF25139M Air Filter, Primary Magnum Rs | Replaces the Donaldson P185069
variants.option1Value: Fleetguard AF25139M Air Filter, Primary Magnum Rs | Replaces the Donaldson P185069
variants.description: ​Fleetguard® AF25139M premium axial seal primary air filter ensures a proper seal and prevent leaks to prevent airborne contaminants from reaching the combustion chamber.
specifications: Style: Air Filter Element - Main, Outer Diameter: 332.0 mm, Inner Diameter: 172.0 mm, Length: 375.0 mm

Designed with high-quality materials, it ensures consistent functionality while meeting demanding operational requirements. Whether used in industrial, automotive, or heavy-duty settings, this component offers dependable operation and longevity. Its versatile design makes it suitable for various uses, supporting system efficiency and overall performance.
